original_idea: Make the editor chat timeline-aware for generation tasks by introducing structured resolved selection context, persisted post-task placement intent, and deterministic completion-time placement for requests like editing a selected image and placing the result after the source clip.
source_notes: The original megaplan init and status data were recovered from the Codex session log.
The reconstructed plan body is primarily based on the inline fallback plan posted while the original plan step was still active.
The original Claude-generated plan markdown was not recovered.
